description_long: This is a tall, slender skyscraper with a rectangular footprint and a blue-tinted glass facade. The building features a grid of evenly spaced windows, giving it a modern and uniform appearance. A prominent vertical sign with large white letters runs down one face, adding a distinctive branding element. The top of the structure is capped with a thin antenna, emphasizing its height and urban function. The facade is smooth and reflective, with subtle textural variation from the window framing. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, typical of contemporary high-rise commercial architecture.
description: A tall, blue-glass skyscraper with a grid of windows and a vertical white-lettered sign, topped by a thin antenna. Its sleek, modern facade is highly reflective and uniform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical white-lettered sign and main entrance at the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's narrow profile and the absence of signage.
description_view_2: Rear view with a uniform grid of windows and no visible signage or entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a narrow profile and no signage.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is composed of blue-tinted glass panels set within a regular grid of thin, metallic mullions, creating a sleek and reflective surface. A vertical white-lettered sign adds visual interest and branding to the main face.
attribute_building_signage: Vertical white-lettered sign on the front facade
